project_type: Full-stack TypeScript app (Express backend + React/Vite frontend)
build_system: npm with Vite for client, tsx for server dev, tsc for server prod build
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compilation. 2. Run `npx vite build --outDir dist/public` to verify the client builds successfully.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to npm registry. Node.js 22 available. No database available for runtime testing (uses Neon PostgreSQL in prod). Validate using TypeScript type-checking and Vite build.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. Uses path aliases: @/* for client/src/*, @shared/* for shared/*. Express routes use authenticateUser middleware. Frontend uses shadcn/ui components, TanStack React Query for data fetching, wouter for routing.

key_patterns.server_routes: Each route file exports a default Router, registered in server/index.ts with app.use('/api', routeModule). Uses authenticateUser and requireRole middleware.
key_patterns.client_pages: Pages are in client/src/pages/, imported in App.tsx and added to wouter Switch routes.
key_patterns.components: UI components in client/src/components/ui/ (shadcn). Feature components in feature-specific folders (charts/, dashboard/, etc.)
key_patterns.data_fetching: TanStack React Query with custom hooks in client/src/lib/api-hooks.ts. apiRequest helper in queryClient.ts.
key_patterns.chart_rendering: AdvancedChartRenderer in client/src/components/charts/advanced-chart-renderer.tsx uses Recharts. Config follows AdvancedChartConfig interface in shared/types.ts.
key_patterns.types: Shared types in shared/types.ts (chart config) and shared/schema.ts (DB schema + Drizzle types).
key_patterns.storage: DatabaseStorage class in server/storage.ts implements IStorage interface with Drizzle ORM queries.

directory_structure: Root: package.json, tsconfig.json, shared/. Client: client/src/ with pages/, components/ (ui/, charts/, dashboard/, data/, ai/, analytics/), lib/. Server: server/ with *-routes.ts files, lib/ (ai-providers/, analytics/, data-connectors/, data-processing/), middleware/, storage.ts, db.ts.
